editorial_accuracy.notes: Unchanged. 133 evidence blocks, all sources clean. RSS feed now accurately represents all 31 chapters.

information_design.notes: BreadcrumbList schema enables rich breadcrumbs in SERPs. Sitemap priority-weighted for high-interest chapters.

code_quality.notes: setJsonLd now supports multi-block arrays. chapterJsonLd returns Article + BreadcrumbList. Server-side bot detection expanded to 13 user agents.
